samples: The child laughed after the dog ran away.
The old king ruled the city for many years.

phrases.phrase: I want to eat sea food.

phrases.roman: no hu kan sa be giyinam ?
phrases.expected: no hu kan sa be giyinam ?

phrases.phrase: The moonlight shines on the river.
I ate because I was hungry.
We stayed inside because it rained.
The child laughed after the dog ran away.
phrases.roman: bagen ta [laughed] shu kal ginek gifet
phrases.expected: bagen ta [laughed] shu kal ginek gifet

phrases.phrase: When the sun rose, we began walking.
phrases.roman: gamtel samdat ra dan diye gifem
phrases.expected: gamtel samdat ra dan diye gifem

phrases.phrase: Although it was cold, they continued.
I know that you are here.
She said she would return tomorrow.
The man who built the house is my friend.
If you help me, we will finish today.
phrases.roman: von sa be kas mi dan tem gem
phrases.expected: von sa be kas mi dan tem gem

phrases.phrase: We rested before continuing our journey.
phrases.roman: dan ta ti di gi fetgi
phrases.expected: dan ta ti di gi fetgi

phrases.phrase: Yesterday we walked to the river. The water was cold, but the morning was beautiful. We built a small fire and cooked food. After we ate, we watched the sunrise over the mountains. Then we returned home together.
phrases.roman: di ta dan gi nan yenanye ye kekshu ta ta mak guwi dan ta kel gen dat datlo shu ta dan tel dan wi kekra gamfo fen shu ta dan gi nalche dan
phrases.expected: di ta dan gi nan yenanye ye kekshu ta ta mak guwi dan ta kel gen dat datlo shu ta dan tel dan wi kekra gamfo fen shu ta dan gi nalche dan

phrases.phrase: The toy was made by the child.
I think he knows that she left.
phrases.roman: mi ta met ba hu ba gi
phrases.expected: mi ta met ba hu ba gi

phrases.phrase: If you had not helped us, we would not have finished the bridge.
phrases.roman: von no be kas dan dan tem nanye
phrases.expected: von no be kas dan dan tem nanye

phrases.phrase: The woman who taught me said that the river had changed.
phrases.roman: ba ta badi kuhu mi se yenanye diho
phrases.expected: ba ta badi kuhu mi se yenanye diho

phrases.phrase: The old hunter gave the child his knife.
phrases.roman: di ta lakalba nesguku bagen fendatsastem
phrases.expected: di ta lakalba nesguku bagen fendatsastem

phrases.phrase: Time heals all wounds, but memory keeps the pain alive.
phrases.roman: kan kasfemba mel tesfem hugatmes gat tes fo
phrases.expected: kan kasfemba mel tesfem hugatmes gat tes fo

phrases.phrase: I will go to the city.
I am going to go to the city.
I am going to the city.
I go away from the city.
They ran toward us from the river.
Are you going to the market tomorrow?
The hunter followed the animal into the forest.
phrases.roman: lakalba ta sogi mes kal lektetche
phrases.expected: lakalba ta sogi mes kal lektetche

phrases.phrase: We should not go there at night.
Go away and leave me alone.
I want to go to the city but I am afraid of the dark.
The bird flew over the lake and landed near the trees.
He said he would return home after the sun set.
phrases.roman: ba se ba giyinam nalche shu samdat ju
phrases.expected: ba se ba giyinam nalche shu samdat ju

phrases.phrase: I have never been to the city before.
The fish swims in the river.
We ran through the forest toward the river.

phrases.roman: no ba gi nalche shu gan
phrases.expected: no ba gi nalche shu gan

phrases.phrase: Tell the child a story about the sea.
I am afraid of the dark.

phrases.expected: di ta ba [ruled] lekche lek kan
